title: Depths of Knowledge Vol 3
description: My goal when selecting the figures is to reframe them as existing artwork within a book and beyond serving the purpose of illustrating a lesson.

media.alt: 45 degree angle view of the sculpture that was orginally an anatomy textbook.
media.caption: What I look for in a figure are indications of advancement of knowledge, scale (from molecule to subjects seen with the naked eye), and humanism.

media.alt: Left side of sculpture in isolation.
media.caption: Science needs to be objective so that we have reasonable degree of certainty that these lessons can aleivate our lives. When possible I include photos of people that not clinical in nature.

media.alt: Right side of sculpture in isolation.
media.caption: When possible I include photos of people that not clinical in nature.

media.alt: Straight on shot on a fish lens.
Wide angle shot of left side of sculpture.
Wide angle shot of right side of sculpture.
